data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve blogs ready to build by tag
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all blog entries filtered by the specified tag that are ready for building and publishing to their respective GitHub Pages repositories. Returns a list of blog objects matching the tag filter. This operation is used to identify which blog posts should be published based on their tag assignments.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. data.summary_suggestion: Update blog entry details
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing blog entry identified by blog_id with new content and metadata. Returns the updated blog object. Changes are immediately reflected in the system.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all blog posts with filtering

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new blog post
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new blog post in the system. Accepts blog content including title, body, tags, publication status (draft/published), and metadata. Tags determine which GitHub Pages repositories the post will be published to. Returns the created blog post object with assigned ID and timestamps. Requires API authentication. The post is immediately stored and can be published based on status parameter.
